search_results.title: Clojure Programming Language Overview
search_results.snippet: Clojure is a modern, dynamic, and functional Lisp on the JVM.

search_results.title: A Short History of Clojure
search_results.snippet: Created by Rich Hickey, first released in 2007.

message.content: Clojure is a Lisp dialect on the JVM created by Rich Hickey in 2007.
